items.title: Please refer to the enclosed revised intimation as per the captioned subject due to inadvertent omission of certain pages of the assurance statement from the previous intimation.
Newspaper Advertisement regarding dispatch of Annual Report FY 2025-26 along with the Notice Convening the 58th Annual General Meeting and information about e - Voting including remote e-Voting.
Communications to Shareholders -Intimation of Web-link of the Annual Report for FY 2025-26
Please find attached herewith the Newspaper publication of Notice of 31st AGM, Annual Report and e-voting.
